variants.title: HiFi Filter SG 5011 Gas Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 51260
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SG 5011 Gas Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 51260
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SG 5011 Gas Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 51260. Easy to install and replace, the SG 5011 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: GAS FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 343.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 239.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 232.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 548.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 528.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 7.0 mm
